sentences.arabic: الْخَطُّ الْعَرَبِيُّ فَنٌّ فَرِيدٌ وَجَمِيلٌ جِدًّا.
sentences.translation: Arapska kaligrafija je jedinstvena i veoma lijepa umjetnost.
sentences.translationEn: Arabic calligraphy is a unique and very beautiful art.

sentences.arabic: يَسْتَخْدِمُ الْفَنَّانُونَ أَقْلَامًا خَاصَّةً لِكِتَابَةِ الْحُرُوفِ بِأَشْكَالٍ رَائِعَةٍ.
sentences.translation: Umjetnici koriste posebne olovke kako bi ispisali slova u divnim oblicima.
sentences.translationEn: Artists use special pens to write letters in wonderful shapes.

sentences.arabic: نَرَى هَذَا الْفَنَّ عَلَى جُدْرَانِ الْمَسَاجِدِ وَفِي الْكُتُبِ الْقَدِيمَةِ.
sentences.translation: Ovu umjetnost vidimo na zidovima džamija i u starim knjigama.
sentences.translationEn: We see this art on the walls of mosques and in old books.

sentences.arabic: يَحْتَاجُ تَعَلُّمُ هَذِهِ الْمَهَارَةِ إِلَى وَقْتٍ طَوِيلٍ وَصَبْرٍ.
sentences.translation: Učenje ove vještine zahtijeva mnogo vremena i strpljenja.
sentences.translationEn: Learning this skill requires a long time and patience.

sentences.arabic: يُعْجَبُ الْكَثِيرُ مِنَ النَّاسِ حَوْلَ الْعَالَمِ بِجَمَالِ الْحَرْفِ الْعَرَبِيِّ.
sentences.translation: Mnogi ljudi širom svijeta dive se ljepoti arapskog pisma.
sentences.translationEn: Many people around the world admire the beauty of the Arabic script.
